topic.title: Installing Bentley OpenRoads Designer
topic.shortdesc: Step-by-step instructions for installing OpenRoads Designer on supported platforms.

section.title: System Requirements
section.p: Before installing, ensure your system meets the following minimum requirements:

section.title: Downloading the Installer
section.p: Download the installer from the Bentley CONNECTION Center. You must have an active Bentley account to access downloads.
Navigate to My Products and select OpenRoads Designer from the product list. Choose the correct version for your license type.

section.title: Installation Steps
section.p: Run the installer as administrator. Follow the on-screen prompts to select installation directory and license configuration.
When prompted, enter your Bentley CONNECTION Center credentials to activate the product license.
Restart your machine after installation completes to ensure all components are loaded correctly.

section.title: Troubleshooting Installation
section.p: If the installer fails, check that your Windows user account has administrator privileges.
Antivirus software may block the installer. Temporarily disable real-time protection during installation and re-enable after.
For license activation failures, verify your network connection and that ports 443 and 80 are not blocked by a firewall.
